title: Castle-Need
description: Now, when playing you need a castle
body:
You want more pillage? Get this mod! You need a castle now because you wooden home got attacked very fast and blasted too VERY FAST! After all, you will be attacked by invaders! Don't worry! you can make a turrets!

This mod adds invaders to the game and accordingly protection from them. With my minecraft mod, there will be a natural reason to build fortresses. Also, you can craft weapons (at the moment it's a rifle and a grenade launcher). Weapons of course require ammo. You can build various forts above the ground or you can build a bunker where they won 't get you )

Primichanie: invaders will not spawn in caves. 

more features will be added.
